title: SUMMER DAY CAMP - 211info
text: YMCA OF KLAMATH FALLS SUMMER DAY CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weekly youth camps during the summer. Activities include swimming, games, arts and crafts, and sports. Each week of summer camp features a different theme and activities. Camps run Monday, June 15, 2026 through Friday, August 28, 2026. 1221 S Alameda Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Grades 1-6 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5:30pm Email (541) 884-4149 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 884-4149 Main phone Main phone (541) 884-4149 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $175 per week for Y Members, $245 per week for community members, scholarships are available DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF KLAMATH FALLS
